summary: Memory writeback stewardship limited to local candidates and provenance checks.
meaning: Use this pack when an agent may inspect provenance and prepare a repo-local memory candidate without becoming the durable memory authority.

notes: May write only repo-local memo candidate surfaces when the repo owns such a port.
Durable reviewed memory remains owned by aoa-memo.

projection_hints: Suitable for memory-keeper specializations that prepare handoff candidates.
Projection must not grant durable memo promotion rights by default.
stop_lines: Do not promote, demote, retire, or rewrite durable memory truth through this pack.
Do not write outside the repo-local memory candidate surface.
